overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing nighttime driving on a rain-soaked highway. The player navigates a futuristic vehicle with a red neon dashboard HUD through heavy rain and fog, passing under concrete overpasses and approaching a distant illuminated urban structure.

events.description: passing under a concrete highway overpass
navigating a gentle right curve while accelerating

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the rain-slicked highway, steering through curves and passing under overpasses

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass structure spanning the road
red and white striped concrete barrier along the roadside
futuristic car dashboard with glowing red neon displays showing speed and navigation
dark silhouettes of industrial structures visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving on a rain-soaked highway at night. The red neon dashboard HUD illuminates the interior while the car passes under massive concrete overpasses. The road curves gently through an industrial area with sparse vegetation visible on the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with distant urban lights

events.description: accelerating to high speed exceeding 100 km/h
passing highway road signs on the right

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed on the open highway, navigating gentle curves while approaching a distant illuminated structure

entered.detail: massive stadium or arcology structure with bright lights visible in the far distance
scattered palm trees lining the highway
highway direction signs mounted on metal poles

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates onto a more open stretch of highway, reaching high speeds as the road stretches ahead through the rainy night. A massive illuminated structure becomes visible in the distance, appearing as a bright focal point against the dark sky. Palm trees and road signs occasionally pass by on the sides.

events.description: encountering a group of people standing on the right roadside

agents.ego_description: driving past a group of people standing on the roadside near an abandoned vehicle, maintaining high speed

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing on the roadside next to a parked vehicle, illuminated by headlights

entered.detail: dark colored vehicle parked on the highway shoulder
scattered objects and debris on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues at high speed through the rainy highway, passing a group of NPCs standing on the right roadside near an abandoned car. The large illuminated structure in the distance grows larger and more defined as the car approaches. The road remains wet with visible rain streaks on the windshield.

events.description: braking and slowing down significantly from high speed
approaching the illuminated toll booth or stadium entrance structure

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching a brightly lit toll plaza or stadium entrance, navigating the final stretch of highway

entered.detail: large illuminated entrance structure with bright lights and toll booths
tall electrical transmission towers and power lines
dense cluster of urban lights indicating proximity to the city

segments.scene_description: The vehicle decelerates significantly as it approaches a massive illuminated structure that appears to be a toll plaza or stadium entrance. The lighting becomes brighter and more mixed with artificial sources. Power lines and transmission towers become visible on the left as the highway transitions into a more urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked industrial highway that gradually transitions into a brightly lit urban gateway. It begins inside a futuristic vehicle, where a red neon dashboard illuminates the interior as the car glides under massive concrete overpasses and through a sparse industrial landscape. As the vehicle accelerates onto an open stretch of road, the environment opens up with passing palm trees and road signs, while a massive illuminated structure emerges as a distant focal point against the dark, rainy sky. The camera continues forward at high speed, passing NPCs and an abandoned car by the roadside, as the distant structure grows larger and more defined through the rain-streaked windshield. Finally, the vehicle decelerates as it enters a brighter urban zone, passing power lines and transmission towers before arriving at the glowing entrance of the massive structure.
